title: Copilot Impact & Adoption
description: Supplementary metrics for measuring Copilot's impact on engineering performance. Contains cross-cutting metrics that don't align to a single DORA pillar — including cohort comparisons, productivity metrics, and Copilot adoption data.

list.name: environment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT environment FROM deployments ORDER BY environment
list.label: Environment

options.content:
# 🤖 Copilot Impact & Adoption Overview

**Supplementary Metrics — Cross-cutting Copilot analysis**

## What This Dashboard Shows
This dashboard contains metrics that don't map to a single DORA pillar but are essential for understanding Copilot's impact on engineering performance. These metrics serve as a **segmentation layer** — they help you compare DORA outcomes between Copilot-active and Copilot-inactive developers.

## Metrics Included
- **DORA by Copilot Cohort**: Side-by-side comparison of all four DORA metrics split by Copilot usage
- **Agent vs Non-Agent**: DORA comparison for developers using Copilot Coding Agent vs those who don't
- **Productivity Metrics**: PR throughput, lines of code, and per-developer output by cohort
- **Copilot Adoption**: Feature usage, acceptance rates, surface distribution, and adoption trends

## How to Use This Data
- Use cohort comparisons to measure Copilot's impact on team velocity and quality
- Track adoption trends to identify teams or individuals who may benefit from enablement
- Combine with pillar-specific dashboards for a complete picture of engineering performance

panels.title: 🤖 Copilot Impact — DORA metrics split by Copilot usage
📊 DORA Metrics by Copilot Cohort
panels.description: Side-by-side comparison of core DORA metrics: Copilot Active (blue) vs Inactive (orange) developers

targets.rawSql:
SELECT metric,
  MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE cohort = 'Copilot Active') AS "Copilot Active",
  MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE cohort = 'Copilot Inactive') AS "Copilot Inactive"
FROM (
SELECT 'Change Lead Time (hrs)' AS metric,
  COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.created_at - pr.merged_at)) / 3600), 0) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment' AND ds.state = 'success' AND pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Deploy Freq (/wk)' AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::float / GREATEST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ($__timeTo()::timestamp - $__timeFrom()::timestamp)) / 604800, 1) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment' AND ds.state = 'success'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
  AND ds.created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id)
GROUP BY cohort

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Change Fail Rate (%)' AS metric,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (SELECT state FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) IN ('failure', 'error')) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

UNION ALL

SELECT 'PR Cycle Time (hrs)' AS metric,
  COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (pr.merged_at - pr.created_at)) / 3600), 0) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

UNION ALL

SELECT 'Rework Rate (%)' AS metric,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM deployment_pull_requests dpr2
    JOIN pull_requests pr2 ON pr2.id = dpr2.pull_request_id
    WHERE dpr2.deployment_id = d.id
    AND pr2.labels @> ANY(ARRAY['[{"name":"hotfix"}]','[{"name":"bugfix"}]','[{"name":"rollback"}]']::jsonb[])
  )) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value,
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort
FROM deployments d
JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE d.environment = '$environment'
  AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort
) sub
GROUP BY metric
ORDER BY CASE metric
  WHEN 'Change Lead Time (hrs)' THEN 1
  WHEN 'Deploy Freq (/wk)' THEN 2
  WHEN 'Change Fail Rate (%)' THEN 3
  WHEN 'PR Cycle Time (hrs)' THEN 4
  WHEN 'Rework Rate (%)' THEN 5
END

panels.title: 🤖 DORA: Agent vs Non-Agent Users
panels.description:
Compare DORA metrics for developers who use Copilot Coding Agent vs those who don't
Based on used_copilot_coding_agent field from GitHub API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT metric,
  MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE cohort = 'Agent Users') AS "Agent Users",
  MAX(value) FILTER (WHERE cohort = 'Non-Agent') AS "Non-Agent"
FROM (
  SELECT 'Lead Time (hrs)' AS metric,
    COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (d.created_at - pr.merged_at)) / 3600), 0) AS value,
    CASE WHEN agent.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Agent Users' ELSE 'Non-Agent' END AS cohort
  FROM deployments d
  JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
  JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
  JOIN deployment_statuses ds ON ds.deployment_id = d.id
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE used_coding_agent = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) agent ON agent.user_id = pr.author_user_id
  WHERE d.environment = '$environment' AND ds.state = 'success' AND pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
    AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND pr.author_user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date)
  GROUP BY cohort

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'PR Cycle Time (hrs)' AS metric,
    COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (pr.merged_at - pr.created_at)) / 3600), 0) AS value,
    CASE WHEN agent.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Agent Users' ELSE 'Non-Agent' END AS cohort
  FROM pull_requests pr
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE used_coding_agent = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) agent ON agent.user_id = pr.author_user_id
  WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND pr.author_user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date)
  GROUP BY cohort

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Fail Rate (%)' AS metric,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE (SELECT state FROM deployment_statuses WHERE deployment_id = d.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1) IN ('failure', 'error')) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS value,
    CASE WHEN agent.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Agent Users' ELSE 'Non-Agent' END AS cohort
  FROM deployments d
  JOIN deployment_pull_requests dpr ON dpr.deployment_id = d.id
  JOIN pull_requests pr ON pr.id = dpr.pull_request_id
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE used_coding_agent = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) agent ON agent.user_id = pr.author_user_id
  WHERE d.environment = '$environment' AND d.created_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    AND pr.author_user_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date)
  GROUP BY cohort
) sub
GROUP BY metric
ORDER BY CASE metric WHEN 'Lead Time (hrs)' THEN 1 WHEN 'PR Cycle Time (hrs)' THEN 2 WHEN 'Fail Rate (%)' THEN 3 END

panels.title: 💻 Copilot Productivity — Developer output by cohort
📦 Merged PRs by Cohort
panels.description: DORA: Throughput · Number of merged pull requests by Copilot usage cohort

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort,
  COUNT(*) AS pr_count
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

panels.title: 📝 Lines by Cohort
panels.description: Code Volume · Lines added and deleted by Copilot usage cohort

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort,
  SUM(COALESCE(pr.additions, 0)) AS lines_added,
  SUM(COALESCE(pr.deletions, 0)) AS lines_deleted
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

panels.title: 👤 PRs/Dev by Cohort
panels.description: Productivity · Average merged PRs per developer by Copilot usage cohort

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN cua.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Copilot Active' ELSE 'Copilot Inactive' END AS cohort,
  COUNT(*)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT pr.author_user_id), 0) AS prs_per_user
FROM pull_requests pr
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM copilot_user_activity WHERE is_active = true AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date) cua ON cua.user_id = pr.author_user_id
WHERE pr.merged_at IS NOT NULL
  AND pr.merged_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
GROUP BY cohort

panels.title: 🔬 Copilot Activity Breakdown — Usage patterns across surfaces and features
🖥️ Primary Surface
panels.description:
Distribution of Copilot users by their primary development surface
Based on last_surface_used from GitHub Copilot Metrics API (most recent surface per user-day)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE last_surface
    WHEN 'vscode' THEN 'VS Code'
    WHEN 'intellij' THEN 'IntelliJ'
    WHEN 'neovim' THEN 'Neovim'
    WHEN 'cli' THEN 'CLI'
    WHEN 'dotcom' THEN 'GitHub.com'
    ELSE COALESCE(last_surface, 'Unknown')
  END AS surface,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS active_users
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true
  AND last_surface IS NOT NULL
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
GROUP BY last_surface
ORDER BY active_users DESC

panels.title: 🧩 Feature Adoption
panels.description:
Number of unique users using each Copilot feature
Based on used_copilot_coding_agent and used_copilot_code_review from GitHub API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT feature, users AS "Unique Users"
FROM (
  SELECT 'Code Completions' AS feature,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
  FROM copilot_user_activity
  WHERE is_active = true AND completions_count > 0
    AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Chat' AS feature,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
  FROM copilot_user_activity
  WHERE is_active = true AND chat_interactions > 0
    AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Coding Agent' AS feature,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
  FROM copilot_user_activity
  WHERE used_coding_agent = true
    AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

  UNION ALL

  SELECT 'Code Review' AS feature,
    COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users
  FROM copilot_user_activity
  WHERE used_code_review = true
    AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
) sub
ORDER BY CASE feature
  WHEN 'Code Completions' THEN 1
  WHEN 'Chat' THEN 2
  WHEN 'Coding Agent' THEN 3
  WHEN 'Code Review' THEN 4
END

panels.title: 📈 Acceptance Rate Trend
panels.description:
Weekly average Copilot suggestion acceptance rate
Higher acceptance = more relevant suggestions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('week', activity_date::timestamp) AS time,
  ROUND(
    SUM(completions_count * acceptance_rate)::numeric
    / NULLIF(SUM(completions_count), 0) * 100, 1
  ) AS "Acceptance Rate (%)"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true
  AND acceptance_rate IS NOT NULL
  AND completions_count > 0
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Completions/Day
panels.description:
Average code completions per active user per day
From completions_count in GitHub Copilot Metrics API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(completions_count)::numeric, 1) AS "Completions/Day"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true AND completions_count > 0
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

panels.title: Chat/Day
panels.description:
Average chat interactions per active user per day
From chat_interactions in GitHub Copilot Metrics API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(chat_interactions)::numeric, 1) AS "Chat/Day"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true AND chat_interactions > 0
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

panels.title: Accept Rate
panels.description:
Average suggestion acceptance rate across all users
Higher = more relevant Copilot suggestions

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  SUM(completions_count * acceptance_rate)::numeric
  / NULLIF(SUM(completions_count), 0) * 100, 1
) AS "Accept Rate"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true AND acceptance_rate IS NOT NULL AND completions_count > 0
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

panels.title: Agent Adoption
panels.description:
Percentage of Copilot users who have used the Coding Agent feature
From used_copilot_coding_agent in GitHub API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE used_coding_agent = true) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 0), 1
) AS "Agent Adoption %"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date

panels.title: Review Adoption
panels.description:
Percentage of Copilot users who have used the Code Review feature
From used_copilot_code_review in GitHub API

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE used_code_review = true) * 100.0
  / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 0), 1
) AS "Review Adoption %"
FROM copilot_user_activity
WHERE is_active = true
  AND activity_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom()::date AND $__timeTo()::date
